title: ShopElite Ecommerce UI Kit
summary: A storefront-first Next.js ecommerce starter with premium merchandising, featured products, conversion-focused sections, responsive layout, and supporting UI state.
description: Built from the mini0 project inside Multiverse, this template packages a polished ecommerce UI system with a storefront home page, category discovery, featured merchandising, timed deals, trust sections, testimonials, newsletter capture, header and footer patterns, and reusable component primitives.
style: Bright conversion-led storefront with premium merchandising
audience: store founders and frontend product teams
layoutNotes: The homepage opens with merchandising-first hero framing and quickly moves into trust and product proof.
The template keeps section spacing consistent so retail content feels like one system instead of disconnected blocks.
The included file bundle focuses on reusable storefront UI rather than shipping the original API-backed homepage unchanged.
responsiveNotes: The header compresses into mobile-friendly search and menu interactions.
Product and category grids collapse cleanly into stacked cards on smaller screens.
Shared spacing utilities keep the storefront readable across desktop, tablet, and mobile.
